dependenciesInterpreter.name: Python interpreter
dependenciesInterpreter.description: Python interpreter path to use for dependencies installation

legacyBlockRunner.name: Legacy block runner
legacyBlockRunner.description: Wether to use the new block runner or the legacy one. The old executes individual blocks, and its prone to bugs. The new flow runner generates a block tree and runs the blocks in the correct order.

showPlacedID.name: Show placedIDs
showPlacedID.description: Wether to show the placedID of placed blocks in the flow builder.
